result.stderr:
git-subdir-copy 1.0.0.0-preview-2
anatawa12

  --commit-even-if-empty                              Creates commit even if
                                                      empty commit. In default,
                                                      if there is no change, the
                                                      commit will never be
                                                      copied.

  -s SUBDIR_REPO, --subdir-repo=SUBDIR_REPO           Required. subdir
                                                      repository path or url.

  -r ROOTDIR_REPO, --rootdir-repo=ROOTDIR_REPO        Required. rootdir
                                                      repository path.

  -c CACHE_FILE_PATH, --cache-file=CACHE_FILE_PATH    path to cache file

  --max-depth                                         max depth of commits

  --trace                                             enable trace log

  -b BRANCH, --branch=BRANCH                          branch name. if not
                                                      specified, all branches
                                                      will be copied

  --subdir-repo-desc=SUBDIR_REPO_DESC                 url or identifier of
                                                      subdir repository.

  --rootdir-repo-desc=ROOTDIR_REPO_DESC               url or identifier of
                                                      rootdir repository.

  -d DIR_IN_SRC, --dir-in-src=DIR_IN_SRC              Required. the directory
                                                      which should be copied.
                                                      you can choose two or more
                                                      directories but only first
                                                      directory which is found
                                                      will only be used

  --help                                              Display this help screen.

  --version                                           Display version
                                                      information.

git-subdir-copy 1.0.0.0-preview-2
anatawa12

  --commit-even-if-empty                              Creates commit even if
                                                      empty commit. In default,
                                                      if there is no change, the
                                                      commit will never be
                                                      copied.

  -s SUBDIR_REPO, --subdir-repo=SUBDIR_REPO           Required. subdir
                                                      repository path or url.

  -r ROOTDIR_REPO, --rootdir-repo=ROOTDIR_REPO        Required. rootdir
                                                      repository path.

  -c CACHE_FILE_PATH, --cache-file=CACHE_FILE_PATH    path to cache file

  --max-depth                                         max depth of commits

  --trace                                             enable trace log

  -b BRANCH, --branch=BRANCH                          branch name. if not
                                                      specified, all branches
                                                      will be copied

  --subdir-repo-desc=SUBDIR_REPO_DESC                 url or identifier of
                                                      subdir repository.

  --rootdir-repo-desc=ROOTDIR_REPO_DESC               url or identifier of
                                                      rootdir repository.

  -d DIR_IN_SRC, --dir-in-src=DIR_IN_SRC              Required. the directory
                                                      which should be copied.
                                                      you can choose two or more
                                                      directories but only first
                                                      directory which is found
                                                      will only be used

  --help                                              Display this help screen.

  --version                                           Display version
                                                      information.

options.description: Creates commit even if empty commit. In default, if there is no change, the commit will never be copied.
